Notice Of Defendant Eubanks Motion To Compel Plaintiff Deposition
Off Calendar Jun-27-2017 Continued To Jul-07-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
James Coy Driscoll (415-673-6000) for Plaintiff/ opposing party Keith Freedman.
James J. Merriman (415-391-7111) and Ryan Patrick (415-552-8230) for Defendant/Moving party Jacqueline eubanks.

The court announces the tentative ruling. Moving party submits to the tentative ruling. The court orders the parties to confer in the hallway re: dates and the parties stipulate to dates. Argued re: sanctions. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument Adopts the tentative ruling as follows with modifications re dates as stipulated by the parties in open court:

DEFENDANT JACQUELINE EUBANKS' Motion To Compel Plaintiff Deposition is GRANTED. Plaintiff failed to appear and/or sit for Court-ordered deposition twice. While Plaintiff's counsel informed the Defendant about his medical condition on June 13, 2017, Plaintiff failed to propose any alternative dates for the deposition as of the date of the opposition to this motion. Trial is set for July 10, 2017. Plaintiff to appear and sit for deposition on July 5, 2017 or any other mutually agreed upon date between June 28, 2017 and July 5, 2017. Parties to each submit a declaration regarding compliance with this Order no later than 9:00 a.m. on July 6, 2017. If Plaintiff fails to appear for deposition or fails to sit for deposition, the Court will consider terminating sanctions at a continued hearing on July 7, 2017 at 9:30 a.m. Monetary sanctions granted in the amount of $1,110 to be paid no later than July 5, 2017. Order signed in open court (See scanned order for details). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)
